metodos.codigoOriginal:
parameters pcSenhaDia
lcCab = [Senha do Dia : ] + pcSenhaDia
lcCrp = []
lcDir = Addbs(Sys(5) + Sys(2003))

lcSch = [http://schemas.microsoft.com/cdo/configuration/]
loObs = Createobject([CDO.Configuration])

Try
	With loObs.Fields
		.Item(lcSch + [smtpserver]) = [mail.4control.com.br]
		.Item(lcSch + [smtpserverport]) = 25
		.Item(lcSch + [sendusing]) = 2
		.Item(lcSch + [smtpauthenticate]) = 0
		.Item(lcSch + [smtpusessl]) = .F.
		.Item(lcSch + [smtpauthenticate]) = 1
		.Item(lcSch + [smtpusess... [TRUNCADO]

LOCAL cCorpo, cFrom, cCC, cTo, cAssunto, cAnexo, cEmail

If Not ThisForm.Automatico
	If Messagebox([Deseja realmente gerar a senha?],4+32+256,[Gerar Senha]) = 7
		Return .f.
	Endif
EndIf 

lcSenha = fGerPswDiarioMC(Val(Sys(1)), Date(), 0)
If Not ThisForm.Automatico
	=Messagebox('Favor Anotar a Senha : ' + Chr(13) + Chr(13) + lcSenha + Chr(13) + Chr(13), 32, 'Senha - 4Control',5000)
EndIf 
Set Step On 
ThisForm.MandaEmail(lcSenha)

parameters pAuto

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.Automatico = pAuto

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)
	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		=DoDefault()
	Else
		If Not ThisForm.Automatico
			=Messagebox('Impossivel Efetuar Conexăo com Servidor de Banco de Dados...', 0+48, 'CreateObject')
		EndIf 
		Return .f.
	EndIf
EndWith

If ThisForm.Automatico
	ThisForm.btnGerSen.Click()... [TRUNCADO]
